# Think in English

> Premium online coaching for IELTS, PTE, CELPIP, Duolingo, LanguageCert, and career English fluency.

Founded and mentored by **Ardra Shaji**, Think in English specializes in personalized, one-on-one, and small-group training. It focuses on breaking the habit of translating from a native language to build authentic confidence, rather than using rigid templates or robotic scripts.

## Navigation & Sections

- [Homepage](https://thinkinenglish.co.in/): Main landing page containing overview, courses, and booking options.
- [Contact/Booking](https://thinkinenglish.co.in/#contact): Inquiry form for booking a demo or submitting details.

## Courses Offered

- **IELTS Prep** (4-8 weeks): Focuses on speaking blocks and writing feedback.
- **PTE Training** (3-6 weeks): Score-driven preparation to master the PTE computer grading algorithm.
- **CELPIP** (4-6 weeks): Canada immigration-focused exam preparation.
- **Duolingo** (2-4 weeks): Fast-track practice for university admissions.
- **LanguageCert** (3-5 weeks): Targeted speaking drills to avoid freezing under pressure.
- **Real Fluency** (Flexible): General career/workplace English confidence and pronunciation correction.
- **Crash Lessons** (Fast fixes): Targeted 2-5 hour short sessions.

## Contact & Inquiries

- **WhatsApp & Call**: [+91 89212 33005](https://wa.me/918921233005)
- **Email**: [mail@thinkinenglish.co.in](mailto:mail@thinkinenglish.co.in)
- **Inquiry Form**: Located at `/ #contact`, routes submitted details (Name, WhatsApp, Email, Struggle, Exam Date) directly to a pre-filled WhatsApp message redirecting to the founder's WhatsApp.
